commit.subject: LU-7162 kernel: kernel update RHEL 7.1 [3.10.0-229.14.1.el7]
commit.message:
LU-7162 kernel: kernel update RHEL 7.1 [3.10.0-229.14.1.el7]

Update RHEL7.1 kernel to 3.10.0-229.14.1.el7
